$comment: Intelligence module manifest. Same plugin contract + intelligence metadata as cyber-opportunities; consumed by config/intelligence/products.json. status 'active' + autoImport true wires it into install/validation/health/backup automatically. A template for future intelligence products (Defence, AI, Government, Healthcare, Market, ...).
name: Daily Energy Intelligence Brief
description: Tracks strategic developments in the energy sector with a heavy focus on the UAE and ADNOC ecosystem (ADNOC, ADNOC Gas, ADNOC Drilling, TAQA, Masdar, Borouge, TA'ZIZ, Mubadala Energy), then regional and global oil & gas, plus energy security, technology, AI, cybersecurity and digital transformation. Produces a premium HTML/PDF/email brief with an AI-generated cover image and an archive copy.

envVars.name: ENERGY_BRIEF_ENABLED
envVars.description: Set to 'false' to disable this intelligence product.

envVars.name: ENERGY_BRIEF_SCHEDULE_CRON
envVars.description: Cron schedule for the brief (default 06:30 daily; configurable).
